channel.title: Saifeddine Makhlouf — Portfolio Updates
channel.description: Project launches, role changes and engineering notes from Saifeddine Makhlouf — Lead Full-Stack Developer.

item.title: Promoted to Lead Full-Stack Developer at YOTSYSTEM
item.dc:creator: Saifeddine Makhlouf
item.description: Now leading engineering teams at YOTSYSTEM — architecting Spring Boot microservices and React Native mobile apps for AI-powered yacht management.

item.title: JuliaBot v2 — 7 specialized agents and 11-language i18n shipped
item.dc:creator: Saifeddine Makhlouf
item.description: Enterprise AI platform now in production with Web3/blockchain architecture, JWT RBAC and full Kubernetes deployment.

item.title: Calliverse hits public beta on Google Play
item.dc:creator: Saifeddine Makhlouf
item.description: Real-time messaging, WebRTC video calls and Stripe-powered premium subscriptions — built with React Native + Supabase.

item.title: National Winner — IEEE AI Challenge (Cybersecurity & ML)
item.dc:creator: Saifeddine Makhlouf
item.description: Took the national title at the IEEE AI Challenge in cybersecurity and machine learning.
